suppressedMessages.message: React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'onInputModeChange'. Either include it or remove the dependency array. If 'onInputModeChange' changes too often, find the parent component that defines it and wrap that definition in useCallback.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [inputMode, onInputModeChange]

suppressedMessages.message: React Hook useEffect has missing dependencies: 'loadComments' and 'selectedPr'. Either include them or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [loadComments, selectedPr, selectedPr.id]

suppressedMessages.message: React Hook useEffect has missing dependencies: 'loadRuns' and 'selectedPr'. Either include them or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [loadRuns, selectedPr, selectedPr.id]

suppressedMessages.message: React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'doRefresh'. Either include it or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [doRefresh]
